axes.name: Product Type

axes.name: Edition Type

axes.name: Storage Capacity
axes.description: Differentiates the internal storage capacity of the PlayStation 5 consoles.

axes.name: Color
axes.description: Differentiates the color or color scheme of the PlayStation 5 consoles or related products.

axes.name: Bundle or Special Edition
axes.description: Differentiates special or limited edition bundles or themed editions of the PlayStation 5 consoles.
